title: aralia bipinnata var. inermis
intro: Aralia bipinnata var. inermis is a plant species, also known as the spineless false aralia or inermis aralia, which is a variant of the Aralia bipinnata plant, characterized by its absence of spines. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Aralia bipinnata var. inermis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various infections, such as respiratory and gastrointestinal issues. The plant is typically prepared for medicinal use through herbal preparations, including infusion, decoction, and tincture, although more research is needed to fully understand its efficacy and potential side effects.
